title: Capital stock; authorization of issuance
doc_html:
§1204.  Capital stock; authorization of issuance

A savings bank may provide for the issuance of capital stock, either by its original articles of incorporation or by an amendment thereto authorized by this Chapter.

Acts 1990, No. 816, §1, eff. Sept. 1, 1990.
doc_text:
§1204.  Capital stock; authorization of issuance
A savings bank may provide for the issuance of capital stock, either by its original articles of incorporation or by an amendment thereto authorized by this Chapter.
Acts 1990, No. 816, §1, eff. Sept. 1, 1990.
